D. Qualitative Results and Analysis
We further demonstrate the predictive capabilities of
the model through qualitative results, as illustrated in
Figs. 5 and 6. In the figure, the green dots correspond to
pedestrian agents requiring prediction, the green dashed line
depicts the historical trajectory of these pedestrians, the green
solid line represents the actual future trajectory, and the blue
thin line denotes the predicted pedestrian trajectory when is set
to K = 6. The qualitative results indicate that the UTD-PTP
framework proposed in this study adeptly captures the real
pedestrian trajectories. Moreover, the trajectories generated by
the UTD-PTP model successfully preserve the diversity of
trajectories within the traversable region.
VI. C ONCLUSION
In this article, we propose a trajectory prediction model,
